text: - a. The work classifications and wage rates. A Davis-Bacon wage decision is simply a listing  of  different  work classifications and the minimum wage rates that must be paid to anyone performing work in those classifications.  You'll want to make sure that the work classification(s)  you  need  are  contained  in  the  wage  decision  and  make  certain you know exactly what wage rate(s) you will need to pay. Some wage decisions cover several counties and/or types of construction work (for example, residential and commercial work) and can be lengthy and difficult to read.  Contact the contract administrator  (HUD  Labor  Relations  field  staff  or  local  agency  staff)  if  you  have any  trouble  reading  the  wage  decision  or  finding  the  work  classification(s)  you  need.
